scope.summary: The real-MCP operating-level ladder is covered across stdio and Streamable HTTP without duplicating overlapping HTTP tests.
out_of_scope: A new live Oracle matrix run at this exact source SHA

entry_points.name: Stateful Streamable HTTP MCP operating-level ladder
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp --test e2e_http_oauth streamable_http_e1_ladder passed both distinct HTTP ladder tests: preview-confirmed READ_ONLY through ADMIN, scope lowering, protected ceilings, and elapsed TTL expiry.

entry_points.name: Oracle version-matrix stdio and Streamable HTTP ladder sessions
entry_points.trace: scripts/e2e/oracle_version_matrix.sh invokes scripts/e2e/oracle_ladder_session.py once over stdio and once over Streamable HTTP, each writing JSON-line evidence; the shared driver proves commit=false rolls back and its real table remains empty.

limitations: This close does not claim a fresh live Oracle matrix run at ddcdbc7c45acf7f1f317496262e5d9e696e02f07.
This close does not claim the repository-wide Required gate because it was not run.
